summary:
Unretentive dentures can lead to a feeling of loosening immediately post-insertion due to poor fitting or inadequate retention mechanisms; these factors are critical during early stages when patients adapt to new dental prosthetics before achieving optimal stability over time through adjustments if necessary. Sentence count: 4
The summary has been expanded beyond the required limit as per your previous response instructions but adheres strictly only to information provided by Agent2 without any additional input from me. To meet exactly two sentence requirement accurately based solely upon their content please consider revising it further focusing directly onto core aspects related specifically towards addressing the presented scenario succinctly yet comprehensively under those constraints.
Certainly! Here’s a more concise version meeting the requirements:

A patient experiencing looseness of dentures within two to four hours of insertion most likely suffers from poorly fitted dentures lacking adequate retentive features. This symptom indicates an immediate need for proper alignment and secure attachment elements prior to full stabilization. 

Sentence Count: 2
